landing.hero_desc: orchestrate ai coding agents across your entire fleet. create tasks, watch them execute in real time, and merge the results — all from one dashboard.
landing.three_steps: three steps from idea to merged code.
landing.step_define_desc: describe your task in plain language — bug fixes, features, refactors. attach context and assign to any project.
landing.step_dispatch_desc: overlord routes the task to the best available worker and ai agent. execution starts immediately across your fleet.
landing.step_monitor_desc: watch real-time progress via the built-in terminal. jump in at any point to guide, correct, or take full control.
landing.complete_platform: a complete platform for ai-assisted software development.
landing.feature_terminal_desc: stream live agent output directly in the browser. full xterm.js integration with scrollback and search.
landing.feature_multi_agent_desc: first-class support for claude code, cursor, and codex. route tasks to the right agent automatically.
landing.feature_routing_desc: intelligent scheduling across your machine fleet. tasks land on the best available worker every time.
landing.feature_pipeline_desc: chain tasks into multi-stage pipelines. build, test, and deploy in one continuous flow.
landing.feature_collab_desc: project-level permissions, audit logs, and shared dashboards. keep your whole team in sync.
landing.feature_security_desc: totp two-factor auth, scoped api tokens, and full audit trail. enterprise-ready from day one.
landing.install_title: get up and running in seconds
landing.install_desc: one command to install. start orchestrating immediately.
